svg.title: SAA: Selective Auditory Attention
svg.desc: The SAA wordmark on a transparent background, with an accent underline beneath the middle A and the expansion "SELECTIVE AUDITORY ATTENTION" in a modern sans-serif beneath. Dark wordmark for light backgrounds. Brand identity card for the attention labs SAA project.

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Condensed', 'IBM Plex Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', system-ui, sans-serif
'IBM Plex Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', system-ui, sans-serif
